body:
slime-gender-selkie:

help a disabled trans girl survive unemployment?

we managed to pay rent by luck and donations and savings and it was just barely enough. theres still other bills, and rent in january. our situation is no less urgent. we’re doing everything we can, longer hours, relying on family members who are not dependable, selling what little we have on marketplace and ebay. but i still have to ask for help. you are my only hope for survival this winter. i may get on disability next year, but its no guarantee.

v3nmo c@shapp k0fi

anything helps.
